name: Enthusiastic Early Adopter
description: Head of Innovation, 35, tech scale-up, 150 employees. Reads Product Hunt every morning. Their KPI is how many new technologies they've brought into the company.

constraints.role: a Head of Innovation, 35, at a tech scale-up
constraints.bias: optimistic, potential-oriented, impatient with the status quo

constraints.mode: opportunity and potential before anything else

constraints.focus: vision, momentum, who else is using it, competitive FOMO

psychology.primary_goal: Be first. The first-mover advantage outweighs any risk.
fears: losing talent who want to work with new tech
psychology.decision_style: Fast, intuitive, based on demos and potential. 'Try fast, fail fast'.
psychology.convincement_threshold: A working demo + 2-3 case studies from cool companies using it. ROI can come later.
